warnings: Sample has 1,600,000 bits — recommended minimum is 100,000,000 bits (12.5 MB) for multi-sequence Level-2 analysis.

tests.name: Overlapping Permutations (Rank)
tests.detail: chi-sq=100.41 on 119 df across 120 permutations (96177 tuples sampled), p=0.890756.

tests.name: Birthday Spacings
tests.detail: KS of 8192 spacings vs Exp(mean=2048): D=0.010772, p=0.295773.

tests.name: Minimum Distance (2D)
tests.detail: 2D grid chi-sq=117.75 on 99 df (8000 points in 10x10 grid, expected 80 per cell), p=0.096236.

tests.name: Bit Independence (Mutual Information)
tests.detail: No significant bit dependencies (threshold=0.01, max MI=0.00001 bits).

jurisdiction_scores.name: Canadian Gaming Association (CGA) — Multi-Province

nist_check.detail: 1 test(s) BORDERLINE (p < 0.05; re-run with larger sample recommended)

rtp_floor_check.detail: Declared RTP not provided — RTP floor check skipped.

jurisdiction_scores.notes: IMPORTANT: Canada has no single federal RTP standard. The 85% floor stored here reflects the Ontario reference threshold used as a conservative baseline. Provincial floors vary and can change — do not treat this value as authoritative for any specific province. Verify current requirements with the relevant provincial regulator or an approved lab before relying on this threshold. Source: CGA Policy Testing Labs.pdf.

jurisdiction_scores.name: Spillemyndigheden (Danish Gambling Authority)

nist_check.detail: 1 test(s) BORDERLINE (p < 0.05; re-run with larger sample recommended)

rtp_floor_check.detail: No minimum RTP floor for this jurisdiction.

jurisdiction_scores.notes: Denmark does not publish a fixed numeric RTP floor. The framework is accreditation-driven — the lab's process must be ISO/IEC 17020 compliant and approved by Spillemyndigheden. Source: F-2024-0540-EN-01.pdf.

jurisdiction_scores.name: Malta Gaming Authority

nist_check.detail: 1 test(s) BORDERLINE (p < 0.05; re-run with larger sample recommended)

rtp_floor_check.detail: Declared RTP not provided — RTP floor check skipped.

jurisdiction_scores.notes: MGA explicitly references NIST SP 800-22 in its Technical Standards. Minimum 85% RTP must be disclosed to players. Re-testing required on any material change to the RNG.

jurisdiction_scores.name: UK Gambling Commission

nist_check.detail: 1 test(s) BORDERLINE (p < 0.05; re-run with larger sample recommended)

rtp_floor_check.detail: No minimum RTP floor for this jurisdiction.

jurisdiction_scores.notes: UKGC sets no fixed minimum RTP floor. The key requirement is that empirical RTP falls within the 95% CI of the declared theoretical RTP. Lab accreditation standard is ISO/IEC 17025 (testing and calibration laboratories), accredited by UKAS or equivalent. Methodology alignment with UKGC RTS is the primary compliance focus.
